title: Infinite Saved Hotbars
description: Adds an infinite amount of extra rows inside the saved hotbars tab
body:
Ever wished for unlimited Creative Saved Hotbars space? This mod makes it a reality!

The **Infinite Saved Hotbars** mod extends the Creative Saved Hotbars infinitely. Whenever you place an item in the last row, a new row automatically appears, giving you endless storage.

**How it works:**
- Add an item by clicking inside a slot while holding it.
- Override an item by clicking inside a slot while holding down **Ctrl**.
- To empty a slot, click a slot while holding **Ctrl**.

Data is saved in `.minecraft/hotbar_extended.nbt`

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9EK4Rvho/images/e39d1239516d3d7cedded363fc4a0e8976ccf3d9.gif)
